markdownRemark.html:
Markdown Files Guide

Goals/Purpose

These are raw/barely edited notes that are published to a public static site at https://kaltepeter.github.io/notes/.

These need to solidy my personal learning and provide notes I can reference if I need to look something up.

These are not complete, articles, or a blog. They may inform blog posts but are not designed to be polished.

Reviewing Files

  • minimal review
  • obvious spelling/grammar mistakes
  • focus on consistent format/structure
